selection.selection_note: Judged only owned repair batch 47 against full standard_source_table metadata, semantic_brief, prior judge feedback, provider references, before/after SVGs, and actual batch-39 repair renders available in the source worktree. Pass means pass-pending-human only; no row is final-approved.

verdicts.observed: Candidate is a tall red rectangular frame with white center.

verdicts.judge_comments: Fail under the strict TOPSHP repair rule: provider/reference silhouette, colour pattern, or text-bearing semantics are not fully preserved. No final approval implied.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the TOPSHP00 square/target-like board reference rather than a tall rectangular panel; preserve red board with the required white-white-red/border pattern.
